title: German Kimchi Wrap
description: A delicious fusion of German and Korean flavors, this wrap combines crispy bacon, spicy kimchi, and fluffy sauerkraut in a crispy German-style wrap.

ingredients.name: Fluffy German-style wrap
ingredients.notes: soft, airy wrap perfect for wrapping up kimchi and bacon

ingredients.name: Green onions
ingredients.notes: thinly sliced green onions for garnish

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: for marinating bacon and adding depth to kimchi

ingredients.name: Brown sugar
ingredients.notes: for balancing out the spiciness of the kimchi

instructions: 1. Preheat a pan over medium heat.
2. Cook the bacon slices until crispy, then set aside.
3. In a separate pan, heat the sesame seeds over low heat, stirring constantly, until fragrant.
4. Add the kimchi to the pan and stir-fry until heated through.
5. Add the soy sauce and brown sugar to the kimchi and stir-fry for another minute.
6. Warm the German-style wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
7. Assemble the wrap by spreading the kimchi mixture onto the wrap, followed by crispy bacon, tangy sauerkraut, and thinly sliced green onions.
9. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds and additional green onions if desired.
10. Slice in half and serve with a side of spicy Gochujang sauce for added flavor.
